parameters.jsCode:
// ============================================================ // Build Weekly Report Email HTML — Syntharra Branded // ============================================================ const d = $input.first().json; // Format duration const fmtDuration = (s) => { if (s < 60) return `${s}s`; const m = Math.floor(s / 60); const sec = s % 60; return sec > 0 ? `${m}m ${sec}s` : `${m}m`; }; // Service breakdown rows let serviceRows = ''; if (d.serviceBreakdown && Object.keys(d.serviceBreakdown).length > 0) { Object.entries(d.serviceBreakdown) .sort((a, b) => b[1] - a[1]) .forEach(([svc, count]) => { serviceRows += `${svc}${count}`; }); } // Top leads rows let leadRows = ''; if (d.topLeads && d.topLeads.length > 0) { d.topLeads.forEach(l => { const scoreColor = l.score >= 8 ? '#e53e3e' : l.score >= 6 ? '#dd6b20' : '#718096'; leadRows += `${l.name}${l.service || 'General'}${l.score}/10`; }); } const emailHtml = `
${serviceRows ? ` ` : ''} ${leadRows ? ` ` : ''}

Weekly AI Receptionist Report

${d.weekStart} — ${d.weekEnd}

Hi ${d.company_name} team,

Here's what ${d.agent_name} accomplished this week:

${d.totalCalls}
Total Calls
${d.totalLeads}
Qualified Leads
${d.totalHotLeads}
Hot Leads
${fmtDuration(d.avgDuration)}
Avg Call Time
${d.avgScore}
Avg Lead Score
${d.totalSpam}
Spam/Junk

Call Breakdown

Hot Leads (score 8-10) ${d.totalHotLeads}
Warm Leads (score 6-7) ${d.totalWarmLeads}
General Inquiries ${d.totalGeneral}
Spam / Junk Calls ${d.totalSpam}

Services Requested

${serviceRows}
Service Type Count

Top Leads This Week

${leadRows}
Name Service Score

Total time ${d.agent_name} spent on the phone this week

${fmtDuration(d.totalDuration)}

Powered by Syntharra AI Receptionist

This is an automated weekly report. Questions? Reply to this email or contact support@syntharra.com

`; return { emailHtml, lead_email: d.lead_email, company_name: d.company_name, agent_name: d.agent_name, totalCalls: d.totalCalls, totalLeads: d.totalLeads, weekStart: d.weekStart, weekEnd: d.weekEnd };

activeVersion.description: Supabase-powered weekly report with timezone-aware 6pm Sunday delivery
